parsed.availability_comment: Available unless late tactical omission; no fresh unavailability signal found after recovery from 2025 finger injury.
parsed.availability_note: No current March 2026 injury, suspension, or national-duty restriction found; prior 2025 finger issue appears historical.
parsed.followup_reason: No official XI confirmation yet; reassess after CSK team sheets for the opening matches.
parsed.overseas_competition_comment: Role versatility helps, but CSK have multiple overseas bowling and all-round options for only four slots.
parsed.overseas_competition_note: Faces strong overseas-slot competition from Noor Ahmad, Dewald Brevis, Nathan Ellis, Akeal Hosein, Matt Henry, Matthew Short and Zak Foulkes.
parsed.playing_xi_comment: In CSK's 2026 squad, but overseas balance makes him a situational pick rather than a lock.
